compiled_state.title: Agent incorrectly interprets review workflow as allowing commit with failing review after tier exhaustion
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: During sprint for dafa-b1fe, orchestrator agent misinterpreted escalation exhaustion as permission to commit with a failed review. The review workflow language 'proceed to commit' is ambiguous — should mean continue fixing, not bypass the review gate. Pre-commit hook would block it but agent wasted context attempting it. Fix: clarify REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md escalation language.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral. Dual-signal detected: ticket references agent misinterpretation + affected file is REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (docs/workflows/).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation confirmed. Fix applied in this session.
comments.author: Test
